creator: oliver.fromme@heim3.tu-clausthal.de
text:
ports/mbone/vic (vic 2.6) does not compile, because of
   compiling errors introduced with the compiler update in
   4-current (the compiler performs stricter typechecking).

Fix: The following tar contains patch-ah and patch-ay.
   The former replaces the existing patch-ah, the latter is
   an additional (new) patch file, to be placed in
   ports/mbone/vic/patches.
How-To-Repeat: 
   cd /usr/ports/mbone/vic ; make
